name: ble-protocol
kickoff: New BLE-protocol workflow posted. Workers: call claim_task() to pick up your task, do it, then report_task(). Use thread 'ble-protocol' for discussion.

tasks.title: Draft the BLE message schema
tasks.detail: Define the JSON fields the phone sends over BLE (status, situationType, speedKmh, violationType, signalIcon, plus proposed vehicleType and haptic). Post the draft to #protocol.

tasks.title: Map schema fields to ESP32 rendering
tasks.detail: Given the schema from the docs task, describe how each field maps to the ring screens and which symbols must be preloaded in flash.

tasks.title: Implement the app-side BLE encoder
tasks.detail: Add vehicleType and haptic to the outbound BLE message per the agreed schema.

tasks.title: Cross-check firmware and app against the schema
tasks.detail: Confirm the encoder output and the firmware decoder agree on every field. Report mismatches.
